zh.lifeSummary: 當Edith FitzHerbert於1457年出生在英國德比夏爾霍洛韋時，她的父親John Wakelin-97歲，母親Alice Marshall-123歲。她於大約1475年與Sir Thomas Babington在英國德比夏爾結婚。他們至少是12個兒子和5個女兒的父母。她去世於1511年在英國德比夏爾阿福享年54歲，埋葬在英國德比夏爾阿福。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Edith FitzHerbert于1457年出生在英国德比夏爾霍洛韋时，她的父亲John Wakelin-97岁，母亲Alice Marshall-123岁。她于大约1475年与Sir Thomas Babington在英国德比夏爾结婚。他们至少是12个儿子和5个女儿的父母。她去世于1511年在英国德比夏爾阿福享年54岁，埋葬在英国德比夏爾阿福。

nameMeanings.name: FitzHerbert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Irish: from Anglo-Norman French fi(t)z ‘son’ (see Fitz ) + the personal name Herbert (see Herbert ), ‘son of Herbert’.

variants.name: Fitz
meanings: English: from Anglo-Norman French fi(t)z ‘son’ (from Latin filius), used originally to distinguish a son from a father bearing the same personal name and then conventionalized as a hereditary surname, or short for a surname of which fiz ‘son’ was the first element, for example Fitzhenry and Fitzroy .
German: from a vernacular pet form of the personal name Vinzenz (see Vincent ) or Vitus (see Vito , compare Veit ). Compare also Fietz .

nameMeanings.name: Edith
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old English female personal name derived from ēad ‘prosperity, riches’ + gӯð ‘strife’. This was borne by a daughter ( 961–984 ) of Edgar the Peaceful. (She was named in accordance with the common Old English practice of repeating name elements within a family.) She spent her short life in a convent, and is regarded as a saint.

variants.name: Edythe
meanings: From an Old English female personal name derived from ēad ‘prosperity, riches’ + gӯð ‘strife’. This was borne by a daughter ( 961–984 ) of Edgar the Peaceful. (She was named in accordance with the common Old English practice of repeating name elements within a family.) She spent her short life in a convent, and is regarded as a saint.

en.lifeSummary: When Edith FitzHerbert was born in 1457, in Holloway, Derbyshire, England, her father, John Wakelin, was -97 and her mother, Alice Marshall, was -123. She married Sir Thomas Babington about 1475, in Derbyshire, England. They were the parents of at least 12 sons and 5 daughters. She died in 1511, in Ashover, Derbyshire, England, at the age of 54, and was buried in Ashover, Derbyshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Edith FitzHerbert est née en 1457, à Holloway, Derbyshire, Angleterre, son père, John Wakelin, avait -97 ans et sa mère, Alice Marshall, avait -123 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Thomas Babington environ 1475, à Derbyshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 12 fils et 5 filles. Elle est décédée en 1511, à Ashover, Derbyshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 54 ans, et a été enterrée à Ashover, Derbyshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Edith FitzHerbert 1457 in Holloway, Derbyshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John Wakelin -97 und ihre Mutter Alice Marshall -123. Sie hat um 1475 in Derbyshire, England Sir Thomas Babington geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 12 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Sie starb 1511 im Alter von 54 Jahren in Ashover, Derbyshire, England und wurde in Ashover, Derbyshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Edith FitzHerbert è nata il nel 1457 nel Holloway, Derbyshire, England, sua padre, John Wakelin, aveva -97 anni e sua madre, Alice Marshall, aveva -123 anni. Lei sposato Sir Thomas Babington circa 1475, nel Derbyshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 12 figli e 5 figlie. Morì nel 1511, nel Ashover, Derbyshire, England, all'età di 54 anni, e fu sepolta a Ashover, Derbyshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Edith FitzHerbertが1457年にイギリスデルブイシュアイアホーロワイで生まれた時，父John Wakelinは-97歳，母Alice Marshallは-123歳であった。約1475年にイギリスデルブイシュアイアでSir Thomas Babingtonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも12人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼女は1511年にイギリスデルブイシュアイアアショバーで54歳で死去し，イギリスデルブイシュアイアアショバーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Edith FitzHerbert(이)가 1457년 영국 더비실르 홀로아이에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Wakelin(은)는 -97세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Alice Marshall(은)는 -123세였다. 그녀는 대략 1475년 영국 더비실르에서 Sir Thomas Babington(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 열 명 이상의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1511년 영국 더비실르 애쇼버에서 54세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 더비실르 애쇼버에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Edith FitzHerbert nasceu em 1457, em Holloway, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Wakelin, tinha -97 anos e sua mãe, Alice Marshall, tinha -123 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Thomas Babington aproximadamente 1475, em Derbyshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 12 filhos e 5 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1511, em Ashover, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, com 54 anos, e foi sepultada em Ashover, Derbyshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Edith FitzHerbert родилась в 1457 г. в местности холлоуеи, дирбишир, Англия, её отцу по имени John Wakelin было -97 год, а матери, которую звали Alice Marshall, -123. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Thomas Babington около 1475 г. в местности дирбишир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 12 сыновей и 5 дочерей. Она умерла в 1511 г. в местности ашовир, дирбишир, Англия в возрасте 54 лет и была похоронена в местности ашовир, дирбишир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Edith FitzHerbert nació en 1457, en Holloway, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, su papá, John Wakelin, tenía -97 años y su mamá, Alice Marshall, tenía -123 años. Se casó con Sir Thomas Babington aproximadamente 1475, en Derbyshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 12 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió en 1511, en Ashover, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 54 años, y fue sepultada en Ashover, Derbyshire, Inglaterra.
